description: User scrolls horizontally through the 'Short tasks & surveys' card list to view more opportunities
frame_description: The user is browsing through a horizontal list of task cards.

description: User scrolls down the page to view the 'Sessions to schedule' section
frame_description: The view shifts from the top tasks to the scheduling section below.

description: User pauses to examine the 'Video Call' session opportunity
frame_description: The cursor rests on a pink card offering $40 for a video call session.

description: User scrolls back up to the top of the page
frame_description: The view returns to the top of the Explore screen.

description: User clicks the 'x' on the 'AI Interview' filter tag to remove it
frame_description: The cursor clicks the close button on a filter tag, causing the list to refresh.

description: User hovers over the 'Video Call' filter tag
frame_description: The cursor lingers over a filter tag in the top navigation bar.

description: User scrolls horizontally through the updated 'Short tasks & surveys' list
frame_description: The user swipes through the task cards after the filter change.
